title: Tabouli
ingredients: ½ cup sliced ripe olives, drained well
¼ cup chopped fresh mint, optional
¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
instructions: Pour boiling water over bulgur and mix.
In separate bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, salt, oregano and cayenne pepper.
Add scallions, parsley, tomato, and olives to bulgur.
Pour oil mixture over bulgur and vegetables.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving.
notes: Best if refrigerated at least 2 hours before serving.
Couscous variation: Heat 1 ½ cups of chicken broth in saucepan, stir in 1 ½ cups of couscous, stir quickly, cover and let sit for 5 minutes, then fluff with fork and let cool.
Add chopped, cooked chicken to salad to make a main dish salad.
